title: Australians told to continue Easter travel plans despite fuel shortages
summary_full: Hundreds of petrol stations across Australia have run out of fuel as the Iran war disrupts global oil shipments and pushes up prices.
summary_public: Hundreds of petrol stations across Australia have run out of fuel as the Iran war disrupts global oil shipments and pushes up prices.

IR.label: neutral
